Bash(PGPASSWORD=aipassword psql -U aiuser -d wishspark -h localhost -c "
-- Understand the timestamp range: are timestamps epoch-ms or epoch-s?
SELECT
  timestamp,
  to_timestamp\(timestamp / 1000.0\) AS as_epoch_ms,
  to_timestamp\(timestamp\) AS as_epoch_s
FROM events
WHERE timestamp IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 5;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=aipassword psql -U aiuser -d wishspark -h localhost -c "
SELECT shop_domain, event_type, url, timestamp,
       to_timestamp\(timestamp/1000.0\) AS ts_as_ms,
       to_timestamp\(timestamp\) AS ts_as_s
FROM events
ORDER BY timestamp DESC;
")

Bash(venv/bin/python -c "
from app.core.redis_client import cache_get, cache_set, cache_delete, KEY_SIGNALS, TTL_SIGNALS, _pool
import os

print\('REDIS_URL:', os.getenv\('REDIS_URL', '\(not set\)'\)\)
print\('_pool:', _pool\)

if _pool:
    key = KEY_SIGNALS.format\(shop='test.myshopify.com'\)
    cache_set\(key, [{'test': True}], 10\)
    result = cache_get\(key\)
    print\('cache round-trip:', result\)
    cache_delete\(key\)
    result2 = cache_get\(key\)
    print\('after delete:', result2\)
    print\('Redis: OK'\)
else:
    print\('Redis: no-op mode \(REDIS_URL not set\)'\)
")

-- What product_urls are in product_metrics and what do raw events look like?
SELECT 'product_metrics' AS src, product_url FROM product_metrics WHERE shop_domain = 'legacy.myshopify.com'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'opportunity_signals', product_url FROM opportunity_signals WHERE shop_domain = 'legacy.myshopify.com' GROUP BY product_url
UNION ALL
SELECT 'visitor_product_state', product_url FROM visitor_product_state WHERE shop_domain = 'legacy.myshopify.com' GROUP BY product_url
UNION ALL
SELECT 'price_intelligence', product_url FROM price_intelligence WHERE shop_domain = 'legacy.myshopify.com'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'unique_product_detection', product_url FROM unique_product_detection WHERE shop_domain = 'legacy.myshopify.com'
ORDER BY src, product_url;
" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=aipassword psql -h localhost -U aiuser -d wishspark -c "
SELECT 
  COUNT\(*\) AS total_events,
  COUNT\(product_url\) AS with_product_url,
  COUNT\(CASE WHEN product_url LIKE '/products/%' THEN 1 END\) AS path_style_product_url,
  COUNT\(CASE WHEN product_url LIKE 'http%' THEN 1 END\) AS full_url_product_url,
  COUNT\(CASE WHEN url LIKE '%/products/%' THEN 1 END\) AS url_has_products
FROM events
WHERE shop_domain = 'legacy.myshopify.com';
" 2>&1)
